children.textContent: After you miss a project deadline, your coworker posts in the team Slack channel:

children.name: p
children.textContent: 5 rapid-fire questions. Spot subtext, decode tone shifts, and find hidden meaning in everyday messages.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Play together, prep for real conversations

children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9B91B8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-plus" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M12 5v14"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: Practice tough behavioral questions. Spot which replies sound defensive vs. confident.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9B91B8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-chevron-right" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: Prep for a real convo — a breakup, confrontation, or raise request. Your group acts it out first.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9B91B8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-chevron-right" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: Politically charged topics, cross-generational tension, and everyone watching what you say.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9B91B8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-chevron-right" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: Decode flirtatious ambiguity, social signals, and mixed messages in romantic contexts.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9B91B8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-chevron-right" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg>
